evals.prompt: We're a B2B SaaS for construction project management. $199/month. Our target buyers are general contractors with 10-50 employees. We have a $5K/month marketing budget. Most of our competitors are doing the same thing — Google ads, LinkedIn, and webinars. What marketing ideas would actually differentiate us?
evals.expected_output: 5-10 differentiated marketing ideas specific to the construction/GC niche, with reasoning for why each would stand out from generic B2B SaaS marketing, and rough feasibility notes for a $5K budget.
assertions: Generates at least 5 distinct marketing ideas
Ideas are specific to the construction/GC audience (not generic B2B advice)
At least 2-3 ideas are channel-diversified from the competitors' LinkedIn/Google/webinar approach
Includes feasibility notes or budget considerations
Explains the differentiation angle for at least some ideas

evals.prompt: What are some low-cost or free marketing ideas for a bootstrapped SaaS with no budget?
evals.expected_output: 10+ zero or near-zero cost marketing ideas across channels (SEO, community, partnerships, content, product-led) with practical first steps for each.
assertions: All ideas are genuinely low/no cost
Covers multiple channels (not all content or all SEO)
Includes at least one community/partnership angle
Gives practical first step for at least some ideas

evals.prompt: Implement a referral program for our SaaS
evals.expected_output: Acknowledges this is a referral program design task and redirects to the referral-program skill, while offering a few high-level campaign ideas for launching/promoting the referral program.
assertions: Recognizes this is referral program design, not just idea generation
Redirects to referral-program skill for detailed implementation
May offer ideas for promoting the referral program (launch campaign, in-app placement)
